fractalQuotes.text: The Bump switch adds 5 dB of boost at 300 Hz. The Mid control is already set to do this. Turn the Mid control up to 7.4.

controls.raw: Tone, Output, 100HZ cut/boost, Gain and Bump switch

fractalQuotes.text: A drive pedal that is marketed as sounding like a JCM800 but is really just another MI Audio Crunchbox / Suhr Riot / etc. derivative which can all trace their lineage back to the Marshall Bluesbreaker.

controls.raw: Drive, Volume, Bass, Middle and Treble

artistNotes: Andy Timmons (used for overdriven aggressive sounds; later worked with JHS on his signature AT pedal based on this circuit)
